Example_EN: I ordered a medium coffee and a sandwich.
Example_CN: 我点了一杯中杯咖啡和一个三明治。

Collocation: melt in heat;melt into;begin to melt
Example_EN: The ice cream began to melt in the hot sun.
Example_CN: 冰淇淋在烈日下开始融化。

Example_EN: A gym membership costs forty pounds a month.
Example_CN: 健身会员费每月四十英镑。

Example_EN: Schools now talk more openly about mental health.
Example_CN: 学校现在更公开谈论心理健康。

Example_EN: Did she mention the meeting time in her email?
Example_CN: 她邮件里提到开会时间了吗？

Example_EN: Local merchants closed early for the festival.
Example_CN: 本地商人节日提前打烊。

Collocation: show mercy;at the mercy of;mercy on
Example_EN: The judge showed mercy because of his age.
Example_CN: 法官因他年幼而表示宽大。

Example_EN: It was a mere chance that we met again.
Example_CN: 我们再次相遇纯属偶然。

Example_EN: This is merely a draft, not the final plan.
Example_CN: 这只是草稿，不是最终计划。

Collocation: make a mess;in a mess;mess up
Example_EN: Please do not make a mess in the kitchen.
Example_CN: 请不要把厨房弄得一团糟。

Example_EN: The garden gate is made of strong metal.
Example_CN: 花园大门由坚固金属制成。

Example_EN: Her teaching method keeps every student involved.
Example_CN: 她的教学方法让每个学生都参与。

Example_EN: We had a mild winter with little snow.
Example_CN: 我们这年冬天温和，几乎没雪。

Collocation: a mile away;miles per hour;walk a mile
Example_EN: The station is about a mile from our hotel.
Example_CN: 车站离我们酒店大约一英里。

Example_EN: He left military service after five years.
Example_CN: 他服役五年后离开军队。

Example_EN: The old flour mill is now a museum.
Example_CN: 这座旧面粉厂现在是博物馆。

Example_EN: Would you like still or sparkling mineral water?
Example_CN: 你想要无汽还是有汽矿泉水？

Example_EN: The law sets a minimum wage for all workers.
Example_CN: 法律规定了所有工人的最低工资。

Example_EN: The health minister visited the new hospital today.
Example_CN: 卫生部长今天视察了新医院。

Example_EN: The Ministry of Education published new guidelines.
Example_CN: 教育部发布了新指南。

Example_EN: There was only a minor delay on the morning train.
Example_CN: 早班火车只有轻微延误。

Example_EN: Ethnic minority students receive extra language support.
Example_CN: 少数族裔学生获得额外语言支持。

Example_EN: Doctors called her recovery a medical miracle.
Example_CN: 医生称她的康复为医学奇迹。

Example_EN: The museum shows models of early guided missiles.
Example_CN: 博物馆展出早期导弹模型。

Example_EN: One book is still missing from the library shelf.
Example_CN: 图书馆书架上仍缺一本书。

Example_EN: The rescue team completed its mission before dark.
Example_CN: 救援队天黑前完成了任务。

Example_EN: Stir the cake mixture until it looks smooth.
Example_CN: 搅拌蛋糕糊直到显得均匀。

Example_EN: Please switch your mobile phone to silent mode.
Example_CN: 请把手机调成静音。

Example_EN: Buses are a cheap mode of transport in the city.
Example_CN: 公交车是城里便宜的出行方式。

Example_EN: Doctors recommend moderate exercise three times a week.
Example_CN: 医生建议每周适度运动三次。

Example_EN: She remains modest about her exam success.
Example_CN: 她对自己的考试成功仍保持谦虚。

Example_EN: We made a small modification to the original plan.
Example_CN: 我们对原计划做了小修改。

Example_EN: Please modify your essay title before you submit.
Example_CN: 交稿前请修改你的作文标题。

Example_EN: I need to call mom before the train leaves.
Example_CN: 火车开走前我得给妈妈打电话。
MemoryTip: mom 偏美式；英式常说 mum。

Collocation: at the moment;wait a moment;special moment
Example_EN: Please wait a moment while I find your file.
Example_CN: 请稍等，我找你的档案。

Example_EN: Teachers monitor progress throughout the school year.
Example_CN: 老师在学年中持续监测进步。

Example_EN: Children laughed at the clever monkey in the zoo.
Example_CN: 孩子们对着动物园聪明的猴子发笑。

Example_EN: The film shows a huge sea monster rising from waves.
Example_CN: 电影里一头大海怪从浪中升起。

Example_EN: We pay a monthly fee for the streaming service.
Example_CN: 我们按月支付流媒体服务费。

Example_EN: Tourists gather around the war monument every November.
Example_CN: 每年十一月游客聚集在战争纪念碑旁。

Collocation: in a good mood;change the mood;mood of
Example_EN: A short walk often puts her in a good mood.
Example_CN: 短短散步常让她心情变好。

Collocation: moral duty;moral of the story;moral support
Example_EN: The moral of the story is to keep trying.
Example_CN: 故事的寓意是坚持尝试。

Example_EN: The room is cheap; moreover, it has a great view.
Example_CN: 房间便宜；而且视野很好。

Example_EN: I woke up with a mosquito bite on my arm.
Example_CN: 我醒来发现手臂上有蚊子叮咬。

Example_EN: The crowd was mostly quiet during the speech.
Example_CN: 演讲期间人群大体安静。

Example_EN: The train was already in motion when we arrived.
Example_CN: 我们到达时火车已在行驶。

Example_EN: Good feedback can motivate students to improve.
Example_CN: 良好反馈能激励学生进步。

Example_EN: He has strong motivation to learn British English.
Example_CN: 他有强烈动机学习英式英语。

Example_EN: The electric motor runs quietly and cleanly.
Example_CN: 电动机运行安静清洁。

Example_EN: He wears a helmet every time he rides a motorcycle.
Example_CN: 他每次骑摩托车都戴头盔。

Example_EN: She learned to mount a horse during the holiday.
Example_CN: 假期她学会了上马。

Example_EN: A sudden movement behind the curtain scared them.
Example_CN: 窗帘后的突然动静吓到了他们。

Example_EN: Their boots were covered in thick mud after the walk.
Example_CN: 散步后他们的靴子沾满厚泥。

Example_EN: There are multiple reasons for the sudden delay.
Example_CN: 突然延误有多重原因。

Example_EN: Can you multiply twelve by fifteen without a calculator?
Example_CN: 你能不用计算器算十二乘十五吗？

Example_EN: The detective novel is a classic murder mystery.
Example_CN: 这部侦探小说是经典谋杀悬疑。

Example_EN: Warm up before sport so you do not pull a muscle.
Example_CN: 运动前热身以免拉伤肌肉。

Example_EN: We ordered mushroom soup as a starter.
Example_CN: 我们点了蘑菇汤作开胃菜。

Example_EN: She has real musical talent on the piano.
Example_CN: 她在钢琴上很有音乐天赋。

Example_EN: Good teams are built on mutual respect.
Example_CN: 好团队建立在相互尊重之上。

Example_EN: A mysterious noise woke us in the middle of the night.
Example_CN: 神秘声响在半夜吵醒了我们。

Example_EN: The missing painting remains an unsolved mystery.
Example_CN: 丢失的画仍是未解之谜。

Example_EN: Children love reading Greek myths about brave heroes.
Example_CN: 孩子们喜欢读希腊神话里的英勇英雄。

Example_EN: Please hammer this nail into the wooden board.
Example_CN: 请把这颗钉子钉进木板。

Example_EN: Stars look faint to the naked eye in the city.
Example_CN: 在城市里肉眼看星星显得很暗。

Example_EN: The film tells a powerful personal narrative.
Example_CN: 这部电影讲述了有力的个人叙事。

Example_EN: Two cars can barely pass on this narrow street.
Example_CN: 这条窄街上两车几乎擦肩。

Example_EN: A nasty smell came from the kitchen bin.
Example_CN: 厨房垃圾桶散发出难闻气味。

Example_EN: The whole nation celebrated the team victory.
Example_CN: 全国庆祝球队获胜。

Example_EN: English is not her native language.
Example_CN: 英语不是她的母语。

Example_EN: Protect the island's natural beauty from pollution.
Example_CN: 保护岛屿自然美景免受污染。

Example_EN: Some metals occur naturally in the ground.
Example_CN: 有些金属天然存在于地下。

Example_EN: He hopes to join the navy after college.
Example_CN: 他希望大学毕业后加入海军。

Example_EN: Is there a pharmacy nearby that is still open?
Example_CN: 附近还有开着的药店吗？

Example_EN: Please keep your desk neat during the exam.
Example_CN: 考试时请保持桌面整洁。

Example_EN: Expensive products are not necessarily better.
Example_CN: 贵的产品不一定更好。

Collocation: sewing needle;needle and thread;needle in a haystack
Example_EN: She threaded a sewing needle with blue cotton.
Example_CN: 她把蓝色棉线穿进缝纫针。

Example_EN: Too little sleep has a negative effect on focus.
Example_CN: 睡眠太少对专注力有负面影响。

Example_EN: Unions negotiate wages with company managers.
Example_CN: 工会与公司管理层谈判工资。

Example_EN: The contract is still under negotiation.
Example_CN: 合同仍在谈判中。

Example_EN: They moved to a quiet neighbourhood near the park.
Example_CN: 他们搬到公园附近安静的街区。

Example_EN: Neither of the answers is completely correct.
Example_CN: 两个答案都不完全正确。

Collocation: lose your nerve;nerve damage;have the nerve
Example_EN: She almost lost her nerve before the big speech.
Example_CN: 重要演讲前她差点胆怯。

Example_EN: Many students feel nervous before oral exams.
Example_CN: 许多学生口语考前紧张。

Example_EN: We found a bird's nest high in the oak tree.
Example_CN: 我们在橡树高处发现鸟巢。

Example_EN: Fishermen repaired the fishing net on the beach.
Example_CN: 渔民在海滩上修补渔网。

Example_EN: She used a professional network to find her first job.
Example_CN: 她通过职业人脉找到第一份工作。

Example_EN: The climb was hard; nevertheless, they reached the top.
Example_CN: 攀登艰难；尽管如此他们到达了山顶。

Example_EN: They moved into a newly built flat last month.
Example_CN: 他们上个月搬进新建公寓。

Example_EN: She woke from a nightmare about missing the train.
Example_CN: 她从错过火车的噩梦中醒来。

Example_EN: It is too noisy here to concentrate on homework.
Example_CN: 这里太吵，无法专心写作业。

Example_EN: The club will nominate someone for best player.
Example_CN: 俱乐部将提名最佳球员人选。

Example_EN: Her first film received an Oscar nomination.
Example_CN: 她的第一部电影获得奥斯卡提名。

Example_EN: She neither called nor sent a message all day.
Example_CN: 她一整天既没打电话也没发短信。
MemoryTip: nor：也不（常与 neither 连用）。

Collocation: social norm;become the norm;deviate from the norm
Example_EN: Working from home has become the norm for many firms.
Example_CN: 居家办公已成为许多公司的常态。

Example_EN: The shop is normally open until six o'clock.
Example_CN: 这家店通常开到六点。

Example_EN: They spent Christmas in a quiet northern city.
Example_CN: 他们在安静的北方城市过圣诞。

Example_EN: She had no clear notion of how trains work.
Example_CN: 她对火车如何运行没有清晰概念。

Example_EN: She is reading a detective novel on the train.
Example_CN: 她在火车上读侦探小说。

Example_EN: Nowadays people check phones more than newspapers.
Example_CN: 如今人们看手机多于看报纸。
